title: Five More Minutes
lyrics:
[verse 1]
Eyes won’t open wide
Sun’s too bright outside
Toes are cold, my nose is too
Need my Yoda glue

[chorus]
Five more minutes now
Five more, please just vow
Stay in bed a little more
Five is what I’m for!

[verse 2]
Pillow’s soft as fluff
Blanket’s warm enough
I could float up in the sky
If you let me try

[chorus]
Five more minutes now
Five more, please just vow
Stay in bed a little more
Five is what I’m for!

[ending]
Five more… *yawn*… okay
I’ll get up today
style_prompt: Catchy children's song, ukulele and cajón, 120 BPM, super bouncy, high energy, impossible to sit still, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
scene: The digital clock on the nightstand glows 7:32 AM, its red numbers casting a faint light on the *Star Wars* sheets as Mom yanks open the curtains and says, "Time to get up, sleepyhead." I clutch my stuffed Yoda tighter and bury my face in the pillow, mumbling, "Five more minutes.
cover_description: Kid hugging Yoda under a blanket while sun peeks through curtains.
